zh.Wraxall, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron於大約1284年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Ralph Gorges45歲，母親Maud de Lovel31歲。他於1301年11月20日之前與Eleanor在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1323年9月27日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Wraxall, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特福拉薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron于大约1284年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Gorges45岁，母亲Maud de Lovel31岁。他于1301年11月20日之前与Eleanor在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1323年9月27日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Gorges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Wilhelm.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in France named with Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (see Gorge 2).

variants.name: Gorge
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a deep valley, from Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (from Old French gorge ‘throat’), or a habitational name from any of various places in France named with this word.
English: variant of   Gorges   2 or   George  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron was born about 1284, in England, his father, Sir Ralph Gorges, was 45 and his mother, Maud de Lovel, was 31. He married Eleanor before 20 November 1301, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died before 27 September 1323, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron est né environ 1284, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Gorges, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Maud de Lovel, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor avant 20 novembre 1301, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 27 septembre 1323, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron um 1284 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Gorges 45 und seine Mutter Maud de Lovel 31. Er hat vor 20. November 1301 in England Eleanor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 27. September 1323 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron è nato il circa 1284 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Gorges, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Lovel, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor prima del 20 novembre 1301, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 27 settembre 1323, nel sua cittadina.

ja.of Escots, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.Wraxall, Somerset, England: イギリスイギリスソメルセトウラクサル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baronが約1284年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Gorgesは45歳，母Maud de Lovelは31歳であった。1301年11月20日以前にイギリスでEleanorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1323年9月27日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron(이)가 대략 1284년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Gorges(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Lovel(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1301년 11월 20일 이전 영국에서 Eleanor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1323년 9월 27일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1284–before 27 September 1323: ойролцоогоор 1284 он–1323 оны Есдүгээр сарын 27–наас өмнө
mn.Wraxall, Somerset, England: Wraxall, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron nasceu aproximadamente 1284, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Gorges, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Lovel, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor antes 20 de novembro de 1301, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 27 de setembro de 1323, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron родился около 1284 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Gorges было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Lovel, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor перед 20 ноябрь 1301 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 27 сентябрь 1323 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1284–before 27 September 1323: e tusa o le 1284–a'e le'I oo le 27 Setema 1323

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron nació aproximadamente 1284, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Gorges, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Maud de Lovel, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Eleanor antes de 20 de noviembre de 1301, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 27 de septiembre de 1323, en su pueblo.
